_comment: The work_request hand-off entity under plain per-record LWW. A1B2 (the requester, standing in for iOS) writes req-1 as `pending`; C3D4 (the fulfiller) re-emits the same id as `done` with a newer updated_at, so `done` wins back on the requester. req-2 shows retirement: A1B2's later delete tombstones its own earlier pending request. Importing a request never triggers work — fulfillment is an explicit local opt-in on the serving device.

req-1._won_from: C3D4 done @ 12:05 beats A1B2 pending @ 12:00 — done wins back

req-2._won_from: A1B2 delete @ 12:10 beats its own pending @ 12:00 — retired request pruned
